nodes.label: November 1977 Ellsworth 'November-5' Missile Site UFO
nodes.summary: Nov 1977 UFO encounter at Ellsworth AFB's November-5 Minuteman II missile site in South Dakota. Witnessed by USAF SP Mario Woods; involved signaling exchange, hovering sphere, and missing time.

Episode: Meet The Nuclear Base Employee Abducted By Aliens (Ft. Mario Woods)
Mario Woods describes a sphere roughly the size of a Walmart building hovering ~10 ft above the blast door of the November-5 Minuteman II silo at Ellsworth.
Woods flashed his facility lights three times; the UFO flashed back in the same pattern — then repeated with a three-two-three sequence — confirming two-way signaling.
Woods was cleared under the USAF Personal Reliability Program (PRP) — explicit vetting of mental-health stability required to work around nuclear weapons.
Woods' dog (a collie) was found in catatonic shock for hours after the incident — corroborating a physical disturbance beyond subjective human report.
Woods' incident left him with missing time and physical marks on his body — classic abduction-case physical signatures.
